props.name: count
props.description: Sets the number of balls in the ballpit.

props.name: gravity
props.description: Controls the gravity affecting the balls.

props.name: friction
props.description: Sets the friction applied to the ball movement.

props.name: wallBounce
props.description: Determines how much balls bounce off walls.

props.name: followCursor
props.description: Enables or disables the sphere following the cursor.

props.name: colors
props.description: Defines the colors of the balls.

props.name: ambientIntensity
props.description: Controls the intensity of ambient light.

props.name: lightIntensity
props.description: Sets the intensity of the main light source.

props.name: minSize
props.description: Specifies the minimum size of the balls.

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Specifies the maximum size of the balls.

props.name: size0
props.description: Initial size value for the cursor ball.

props.name: maxVelocity
props.description: Limits the maximum velocity of the balls.
